## Features to Test

- Upload functionality
- Markdown parsing
- Preview rendering
- Saving notes

*Italic Text*

---

## 🧪 How to use

1. Create a file → `test.md`
2. Paste above content
3. Upload in your app
4. Check:
   - Preview works ✅
   - Content fills textarea ✅
   - Title auto-fills ✅
   - Save works ✅
